message:
Fix pause not stopping agents — wrong systemd service names (#138)

cmd_stop(), ensure_agents(), and cmd_logs() referenced nonexistent
service names (claude-scanner, hive@reviewer, etc.) instead of the
actual supervised-agent@<name> template instances. systemctl stop
silently failed, so paused agents kept running.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
